languages.text: "Я уверена, что вы всего лишь шутите, но... Мы тут все — заодно против мира, Ваша Светлость. Сотни лет мы учились прикрывать друг друга и выживать. Убив нашего командира вы станете для нас врагом". {n}Взгляд Ведки полон ужаса, но голос звучит решительно.{/n} "В Уставе написано: "Кто не поднимет орудия во спасение командира своего, тот повинен в смерти".

"You jest, I'm sure, but... All of us here — it's us against the world, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. For hundreds of years, we learned to watch each other's backs and survive. If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Handbook states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"
languages.original_text: "Я уверена, что вы всего лишь шутите, но... Мы тут все — заодно против мира, Ваша Светлость. Сотни лет мы учились прикрывать друг друга и выживать. Убив нашего командира вы станете для нас врагом". {n}Взгляд Ведки полон ужаса, но голос звучит решительно.{/n} "В Уставе написано: "Кто не поднимет орудия во спасение командира своего, тот повинен в смерти".

If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Code states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"

"You jest, I'm sure, but... All of us here — it's us against the world, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. For hundreds of years, we learned to watch each other's backs and survive. If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Code states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"

"That would lead to a bloodbath, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Even those who are on your side now won't turn against their own. All of us here — it's us against the world, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... And hundreds of hardened fighters will go berserk and stand up for their own."

If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Code states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"

If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Handbook states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"

languages.text: 「それは血みどろの戦いを引き起こすでしょう、御{mf|殿|殿}様。今、御{mf|殿|殿}様の味方である者たちも、自分たちの味方には逆らわないでしょう。ここにいる我々全員は、御{mf|殿|殿}様と世界を相手にしているのです...そして、数百の ベテランが狂乱し、自分たちの味方になるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "That would lead to a bloodbath, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Even those who are on your side now won't turn against their own. All of us here — it's us against the world, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... And hundreds of hardened fighters will go berserk and stand up for their own."

traits.locale_text: 「それは血みどろの戦いを引き起こすでしょう、御{mf|殿|殿}様。今、御{mf|殿|殿}様の味方である者たちも、自分たちの味方には逆らわないでしょう。ここにいる我々全員は、御{mf|殿|殿}様と世界を相手にしているのです...そして、数百の hardened fighters が狂乱し、自分たちの味方になるでしょう。」

languages.text: « Vous plaisantez, à n'en pas douter, mais... Nous voyons tous les choses de la même manière : c'est nous contre le reste du monde. Pendant des siècles, nous avons appris à nous protéger les uns les autres et à survivre. Si vous tuez notre commandant, vous ferez de nous votre ennemi. » {n}Le regard de Dunawski est terrifié, mais sa voix reste ferme.{/n} « Selon le Manuel, "un soldat qui ne brandit pas son arme pour sauver son commandant sera considéré comme complice du trépas de celui-ci". »
languages.original_text: "You jest, I'm sure, but... All of us here — it's us against the world, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. For hundreds of years, we learned to watch each other's backs and survive. If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Handbook states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"

traits.locale_text: « Vous plaisantez, à n'en pas douter, mais... Nous voyons tous les choses de la même manière : c'est nous contre le reste du monde. Pendant des siècles, nous avons appris à nous protéger les uns les autres et à survivre. Si vous tuez notre commandant, vous ferez de nous votre ennemi. » {n}Le regard de Dunawski est terrifié, mais sa voix reste ferme.{/n} « Selon le Manuel, "un soldat qui ne brandit pas son arme pour sauver son commandant sera considéré comme complice du trépas de celui-ci". »

languages.text: "Şaka yaptığınıza eminim ama... Burada hepimiz, dünyaya karşı biriz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Yüzlerce yıl boyunca birbirimizin arkasını kollamayı ve hayatta kalmayı öğrendik. Komutanımızı öldürürseniz düşmanımız olursunuz." {n}Dunawski'nin gözlerinde dehşete kararlı sesi eşlik ediyor.{/n} "El Kitabı der ki: 'Komutanını kurtarmak için silahını kaldırmayan asker, onun ölümüne ortak olmuş sayılır.'"
languages.original_text: "You jest, I'm sure, but... All of us here — it's us against the world, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. For hundreds of years, we learned to watch each other's backs and survive. If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Handbook states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"

traits.locale_text: "Şaka yaptığınıza eminim ama... Burada hepimiz, dünyaya karşı biriz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Yüzlerce yıl boyunca birbirimizin arkasını kollamayı ve hayatta kalmayı öğrendik. Komutanımızı öldürürseniz düşmanımız olursunuz." {n}Dunawski'nin gözlerinde dehşete kararlı sesi eşlik ediyor.{/n} "El Kitabı der ki: 'Komutanını kurtarmak için silahını kaldırmayan asker, onun ölümüne ortak olmuş sayılır.'"

languages.text: "Ich bin sicher, Ihr scherzt, aber ... Wir alle hier ... wir gegen die Welt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir haben in Hunderten von Jahren gelernt, uns gegenseitig den Rücken freizuhalten und zu überleben. Tötet Ihr unseren Commander, seid Ihr fortan {mf|unser Feind|unsere Feindin}." {n}Du erkennst Angst in Dunawskis Augen, aber ihre Stimme ist fest.{/n} "Das Handbuch besagt, 'Ein Soldat, der nicht die Waffe erhebt, um seinen Commander zu retten, ist mitschuldig an dessen Tod.'"
languages.original_text: "You jest, I'm sure, but... All of us here — it's us against the world, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. For hundreds of years, we learned to watch each other's backs and survive. If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Handbook states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin sicher, Ihr scherzt, aber ... Wir alle hier ... wir gegen die Welt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir haben in Hunderten von Jahren gelernt, uns gegenseitig den Rücken freizuhalten und zu überleben. Tötet Ihr unseren Commander, seid Ihr fortan {mf|unser Feind|unsere Feindin}." {n}Du erkennst Angst in Dunawskis Augen, aber ihre Stimme ist fest.{/n} "Das Handbuch besagt, 'Ein Soldat, der nicht die Waffe erhebt, um seinen Commander zu retten, ist mitschuldig an dessen Tod.'"

languages.text: «Ya sé que bromea, pero... todos nosotros. Estamos unidos contra el planeta, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Durante siglos, hemos aprendido a cuidarnos entre nosotros y sobrevivir. Si matara a nuestro comandante, se convertiría en nuestr{mf|o|a} enemig{mf|o|a}». {n}La mirada de Dunawski está llena de terror, pero su voz es firme.{/n} «Como dice el manual: "Un soldado que no levanta su arma para proteger a su comandante se considerará cómplice de su muerte"».
languages.original_text: "You jest, I'm sure, but... All of us here — it's us against the world, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. For hundreds of years, we learned to watch each other's backs and survive. If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Handbook states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"

traits.locale_text: «Ya sé que bromea, pero... todos nosotros. Estamos unidos contra el planeta, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Durante siglos, hemos aprendido a cuidarnos entre nosotros y sobrevivir. Si matara a nuestro comandante, se convertiría en nuestr{mf|o|a} enemig{mf|o|a}». {n}La mirada de Dunawski está llena de terror, pero su voz es firme.{/n} «Como dice el manual: "Un soldado que no levanta su arma para proteger a su comandante se considerará cómplice de su muerte"».

languages.text: “您肯定是在说笑，不过……我们一直都在靠自己对抗这个世界，大人。几百年来，我们学会了彼此照应，只为生存下去。您要是杀了我们的指挥官，那就会成为我们的敌人。”{n}杜纳芙斯卡的眼神里带着一丝恐惧，但语气依然坚定。{/n}“《手册》上写得很清楚，‘士兵若没有举起武器保护自己的指挥官，则被视为共谋加害。’”
languages.original_text: "You jest, I'm sure, but... All of us here — it's us against the world, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. For hundreds of years, we learned to watch each other's backs and survive. If you kill our commander, you will become our enemy." {n}There is horror in Dunawski's eyes, but her voice is firm.{/n} "The Handbook states, 'A soldier who does not raise their weapon to save their commander is to be deemed complicit in their demise.'"
